name: chr20_20q13_32_GHRH_SD
description: 20q13.32 SD region surrounding GHRH (growth-hormone releasing hormone) and KCNB1. Short flanking SDs of ~5-20 kb at 92-96% identity contribute to GRCh38 mapping ambiguity at gene boundaries; locus is part of the 20q tail SD field.

architecture.internal_structure: Short 5-20 kb intra-chromosomal SDs at 92-96% identity flanking GHRH, MANBAL; mosaic of partial duplicons.
